sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Fixed native column headers containing a leading digit (e.g. auto-elections' "1st seconder" / "2nd seconder") being mangled to "st seconder" / "nd seconder" in both the rendered header text and `data-col-name`. The shared icon-stripping regex in `makeTableSortableUnified` blindly stripped ASCII `0-9` from raw, undecorated header text — removed there (only decorative icon glyphs and Unicode superscript multi-sort-order digits are stripped now) and made `getCleanColName` prefer the already-correct `th.dataset.colName` over re-deriving from text that later also carries the live uniq-count badge digits.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: cd-stub (`/cdstub/browse`): the informational "Added N years ago, last modified M years ago" row that MusicBrainz renders after every real row is no longer silently dropped — it is now folded into the preceding row as a disambiguation comment (`(…)`) appended to the Title cell, mirroring the existing `cdtoc` tracklist-row interception pattern in `startFetchingProcess`. `cd-stub` now also declares `extractMainColumn: 'Title'`, so the merged text populates dedicated MB-Name/Comment columns.

Instrument list (`/instruments`, WIP.1): added a new `Name_Comment_Description` extractor that splits each family's combined cell (name link, optional short comment, optional longer free-text description — which may itself contain nested instrument links) into separate Name / Comment / Description columns, wired per-family via `entityFeatures` (mirrors the `tag-value` per-group columnExtractor pattern). Required extending two pageType gates in `startFetchingProcess` / `renderGroupedTable` (row-level colIdx re-resolution, and per-group thead rebuild) to also cover `instrument-list`, alongside the existing `tag-value` / `user-tag-value` / `user-ratings` pageTypes.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Added support for five new page types: Auto-editor elections (`/elections`), Genre list (`/genres`), Top CD stubs (`/cdstub/browse`), Edit types (`/doc/Edit_Types`), and Instrument list (`/instruments`). All five reuse existing `applyListToTable` conversion structures — Structure G (bare `<ul>` → one-column table, extended for `genres-list`) and Structure J (repeated `<h2>+<ul>` category sections → one table per section, extended for `edit-types` and `instrument-list` with a per-section column name instead of `reports-index`'s fixed literal). `cd-stub`'s informational 'Added N years ago…' filler rows are skipped by the existing generic single-cell/colSpan>1 row-extraction guard with no new code.
